caption:
The Swiss AI Initiative has unveiled Apertus, a fully open foundation model designed for sovereign AI. This innovative model complies with EU AI Act requirements and supports multilingual capabilities across 1000+ languages.

How will open models like Apertus impact AI development?

Sources: Swiss AI Initiative, Apertus Official Site
#Apertus #AI #OpenAI #SwissAI #Innovation #MachineLearning #Technology #EUAI #MultilingualAI #DataPrivacy

slides.headline: APERTUS IS A FULLY OPEN FOUNDATION MODEL FOR SOVEREIGN AI
slides.sub: Here's what you need to know about Apertus.
slides.image_prompt: A diverse group of researchers collaborating in a bright, modern lab, surrounded by AI technology and data visualizations.

slides.headline: DEVELOPED BY SWISS AI INITIATIVE WITH EPFL, ETH ZURICH, AND CSCS
slides.sub: Collaboration among leading Swiss institutions fosters significant advancements in AI.
slides.image_prompt: Close-up of a researcher working on a computer, with AI algorithms visible on the screen.

slides.headline: COMPETITIVE WITH 8B AND 70B PARAMETERS, TRAINED IN 1000+ LANGUAGES
slides.sub: Apertus offers multilingual support right from its initial launch.
slides.image_prompt: A split image showing diverse text in various languages, symbolizing multilingual capabilities.

slides.headline: BUILT TO MEET EU AI ACT REQUIREMENTS FOR DATA PRIVACY
slides.sub: Apertus respects user opt-outs and prevents the memorization of personal data.
slides.image_prompt: A person using a smartphone with a shield symbolizing data protection and privacy.

slides.headline: APERTUS PROVIDES A GLOBAL FOUNDATION FOR AI DEVELOPMENT
slides.sub: Follow @everydayhypehq for daily AI + Tech breakthroughs.
slides.image_prompt: A futuristic cityscape at sunset, representing the future of technology and innovation.

story.title: Apertus – Open Foundation Model for Sovereign AI
